title: Farming XP
body:
> **What this mod adds:**
> - Farming now gives XP.
> 
> **Different XP Values from Crops:**
> - Basic Crops like Wheat, Carrots and Potatoes give 1 XP Orb
> - A bit more Rare Crops like Nether Wart, Beatroot and Cocoa Beans give More.
> 
> **Mod Compatibility:**
> - This mod works with Almost Any Mod that adds new Crops!
> 
> **Why you should use this:**
> - Unlike many Farming XP Mods this one Actually works with other mods!
> 
> **Credits:**
> - If you use this mod in a modpack please Credit me!
>
